---
name: Docs or handoff task
about: Improve documentation, logs, roadmap, or agent handoff material
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the documentation or handoff improvement.

## Relevant paths

- `README.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `docs/`
- `docs/delivery/DEVELOPERS_LOG.md`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Documentation matches the current repo behavior.
- [ ] Follow-up TODOs are explicit and actionable.
- [ ] Reviewing agents can understand the context without prior chat history.
- [ ] Links and commands are accurate.
